---
title: "My talk in Bogotá"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2014-07-25"
categories:
  - "Estadística"
  - "Stats"
---

[In this talk](http://gutierrezandres.files.wordpress.com/2014/07/ginipres.pdf) we consider the problem of estimating the Gini coefficient having into account the sampling weights induced by a complex sampling design. We carry out several Monte Carlo simulations and found that the estimator is design-unbiased under the considered scenarios.
